title: Center hero text elements and replace duplicate brand text with logo

requirements.text: Center the three styled brand name elements ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') displayed in the hero section (the h1 elements at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/h1[1], h1[2], and h1[3]) so they are horizontally centered on the page instead of left-aligned.
acceptanceCriteria: The three h1 brand name elements in the hero section are centered horizontally.
Centering applies consistently on all screen sizes.

requirements.text: In the left side top area of the hero section, remove the duplicate 'Legend X Arena' text labels (the second occurrence of the brand name) and replace them with the original logo image asset (the same logo used in the Navbar).

quotes: left side per uper Jo likha he dusri Baar legend x arena to us ko remove Karke logo lagao wapis wohi wala

acceptanceCriteria: The duplicate 'Legend', 'X', 'Arena' text shown in the top-left area of the hero section is removed.
The original logo image (as used in the Navbar) is displayed in its place.
No duplicate brand text labels appear anywhere in the hero section's top-left area.

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Only modify the selected elements identified by the provided XPath expressions and their immediate container in HeroSection.tsx.
Use the same logo asset already referenced in Navbar.tsx — do not introduce a new asset.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall hero section layout.
Changing the styled appearance (colors, fonts, effects) of the 'Legend', 'X', 'Arena' elements.
Modifying the Footer or Navbar brand name elements.
